docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, TONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHADWICK, JORDAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 434 HEAD ST., #1 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94132, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISSES**
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $22 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, TONY
DECLARATION RE: ORIGINAL LEASE/RENTAL AGREEMENT BY MICHAEL HALL, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, TONY
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, TONY AS TO DEFENDANT CHADWICK, JORDAN ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, TONY AS TO DEFENDANT CHADWICK, JORDAN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, TONY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, TONY SERVED JUN-04-2012, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT CHADWICK, JORDAN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CHADWICK, JORDAN
ORDER AUTHORIZING SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT BY POSTING AND MAILING
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, TONY SERVED JUN-04-2012, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $410.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CHADWICK, JORDAN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHADWICK, JORDAN
